query:
SELECT a.id, a.nome, a.s3Key, a.convenioId, a.status, c.nome as convenioNome 
FROM arquivos a 
LEFT JOIN convenios c ON a.convenioId = c.id 
WHERE a.nome LIKE '%vivacom%' OR a.nome LIKE '%VIVACOM%' OR c.nome LIKE '%vivacom%' OR c.nome LIKE '%VIVACOM%'
LIMIT 10;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2xKWvZvidGuv3Qt.root --database 98MRdVE9Uf2ZRMz25bPSye --execute SELECT a.id, a.nome, a.s3Key, a.convenioId, a.status, c.nome as convenioNome 
FROM arquivos a 
LEFT JOIN convenios c ON a.convenioId = c.id 
WHERE a.nome LIKE '%vivacom%' OR a.nome LIKE '%VIVACOM%' OR c.nome LIKE '%vivacom%' OR c.nome LIKE '%VIVACOM%'
LIMIT 10;
